category_sources: Official Linux i2c wiki describes i2c-tools as Linux I2C utilities including probing, dumping, SMBus access, EEPROM decoding, and programming tools.
source_facts.description says this is a heterogeneous set of I2C tools for Linux.
display_name_sources: Official Linux i2c wiki page is titled I2C Tools.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official Linux i2c wiki page; the page is archived but remains the project documentation and repository index.
repo_sources: Official Linux i2c wiki gives the git.kernel.org i2c-tools repository clone URL and online repository link.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was researched.
tags_sources: Official Linux i2c wiki lists bus probing, chip dumping, SMBus helpers, EEPROM decoding, and EEPROM programming utilities.
